text: These reforms are mentioned in IV Kg. 23 as if they had happened only after the rediscovery of the law in Josias’ eighteenth year. It seems probable that the author of that book mentioned them out of their historical order, as a more logical arrangement.
The Latin here has ‘Intercede with the Lord’, but the word used in the Hebrew text is the same as that used in IV Kg. 22.13.
